text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho is over. Silence Suzuka
announces she wants to focus on rehabilitating
her leg so she can preserve her running career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Worried she was going to insist on continuing to
run, I can't help but be shocked by her prudent
choice to prioritize her health.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says my cheers of encouragement were what
gave her the strength to see the autumn Tenno
Sho through.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tells me she wishes to move forward together
and continue basking in the scenery from the
lead.
